Gong.Name: SoulColor_1
Gong.Desc: Yuan Shitian respects the Taoism in the world, the secret of the colorful glaze valley。
Gong.SelectDesc: This method is an auxiliary method that excels at restoring Qi and refining tools. Do you choose to practice this technique?

Stage.Name: SoulColor1
Stage.Desc: The state of spiritual practice requires hard work and meditation。

Neck.Desc: To enter this state of spiritual practice, you need to gradually strengthen your vitality and drive it through the Sanguan Santian and the second pulse of the Governor. This is Sunday。
Unity of spirit and spirit, forming Jindan, laying the foundation。
Jin Dan was first established, and the thunderstorm thwarted enlightenment。
Self-proclaimed supernatural power, returning to normal, Yuan Yuan appears, breaking the cage of the physical body, which is called the fairyland。
Use the breath of the mother earth to nurture the gods and make them grow。
Condensing the gods with the power of heaven and earth。
Since opening the heavenly gate, she came out of the shell and fled. [color = # D06508] \ nThis bottleneck is difficult to break through and has no experience bonus。[/color]

The magic of heaven is achieved with Yuanshen. Once this level is passed, it will face the sky. [color = # D06508] \ nThis bottleneck is difficult to break through and has no experience bonus。[/color]
Heaven and earth counterattack came, the immortal tragedy was on the lookout, otherwise it was ashes。
